content:
Worm Moon (March): Meaning & Crystals

The Worm Moon is March's full moon, when earthworms signal thawing soil. Symbolizes renewal and emergence.

  • Crystals: aquamarine, bloodstone

What Is Worm Moon (March)?

The Worm Moon is March's full moon, when earthworms signal thawing soil. Symbolizes renewal and emergence.

Worm Moon (March) Explained

The worm moon marks the full moon in March, named when rising soil temperatures coax earthworms to the surface. This lunar phase invites a moment of seasonal transition, offering a quiet space to reflect on personal growth and set new intentions. Many people use this time to align their daily rhythms with the natural world, often pairing reflection with grounding stones and water-element gems.

How to Engage

  1. Step 1: March full moon
  2. Step 2: plant seeds of intention
